subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine splendor! For a long time no sweet fragrance from the rose-garden of those loved ones' hearts hath reached me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام ابهی مدتیست مدیده که نفحه خوشی از گلستان قلب آن یاران به دماغ
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
